languages.text: {n}Громоподобный рык Ульфара сотрясает окрестности, обрываясь на низкой угрожающей ноте.{/n} "Клянусь твердой рукой Всеотца, эти ксеносы вздумали морочить нас, словно считают себя мудрейшими из мудрых! Когда я до них доберусь, головы их захрустят под моими ногами!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Громоподобный рык Ульфара сотрясает окрестности, обрываясь на низкой угрожающей ноте.{/n} "Клянусь твердой рукой Всеотца, эти ксеносы вздумали морочить нас, словно считают себя мудрейшими из мудрых! Когда я до них доберусь, головы их захрустят под моими ногами!"
traits.speaker: UlfarCompanion

languages.text: {n}Ulfar's thunderous roar shakes the surroundings, trailing off into a low, menacing rumble.{/n} "By the Allfather's steadfast hand, these xenos think to mock us, as if they count themselves the wisest of the wise! When I lay my hands upon them, their skulls shall crack beneath my boots!"
languages.original_text: {n}Громоподобный рык Ульфара сотрясает окрестности, обрываясь на низкой угрожающей ноте.{/n} "Клянусь твердой рукой Всеотца, эти ксеносы вздумали морочить нас, словно считают себя мудрейшими из мудрых! Когда я до них доберусь, головы их захрустят под моими ногами!"

When I lay my hands upon them, their skulls shall crack beneath my boots!"

{n}Ulfar's thunderous roar shakes your surroundings and breaks off on a low, threatening note.{/n} "By the Allfather's beard, these xenos dare to torment us as though they think themselves the wisest of the wise! When I get them, their heads will crunch beneath my feet!"

{n}Ulfar's thunderous roar shakes the surroundings, trailing off into a low, menacing note.{/n} "By the Allfather's steadfast hand, these xenos think to mock us, as if they count themselves the wisest of the wise! When I lay my hands upon them, their skulls shall crack beneath my boots!"

{n}Ulfar's thunderous roar shakes the surroundings, trailing off into a low, menacing rumble.{/n} "By the Allfather's steadfast hand, these xenos think to mock us, as if they count themselves the wisest of the wise! When I lay my hands upon them, their skulls shall crack beneath my boots!"

{n}Ulfar's thunderous roar shakes the surroundings, trailing off into a low, menacing rumble.{/n} "By the Allfather's steadfast hand, these xenos think to mock us, as if they count themselves the wisest of the wise! When I lay my hands upon them, their skulls shall crack beneath my boots!"

languages.text: {n}乌尔法雷霆般的咆哮震撼四周，余音化作低沉的威胁。{/n}“坚毅的全父在上，这些异形竟以为能嘲弄我等，仿佛它们才是智者中的智者！待我逮住它们，定会将它们的脑袋踏碎在我的靴下！”
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar's thunderous roar shakes the surroundings, trailing off into a low, menacing rumble.{/n} "By the Allfather's steadfast hand, these xenos think to mock us, as if they count themselves the wisest of the wise! When I lay my hands upon them, their skulls shall crack beneath my boots!"

traits.locale_text: {n}乌尔法雷霆般的咆哮震撼四周，余音化作低沉的威胁。{/n}“坚毅的全父在上，这些异形竟以为能嘲弄我等，仿佛它们才是智者中的智者！待我逮住它们，定会将它们的脑袋踏碎在我的靴下！”

languages.text: {n}Le rugissement tonitruant d'Ulfar fait trembler les environs avant de se transformer en un ricanement bas et menaçant.{/n} « Par la poigne ferme du Père de Tous, à croire que ces xénos se prennent pour des génies, pour oser se moquer de nous de la sorte ! Amenez-les-moi, et je leur broierai le crâne sous mes bottes ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar's thunderous roar shakes the surroundings, trailing off into a low, menacing rumble.{/n} "By the Allfather's steadfast hand, these xenos think to mock us, as if they count themselves the wisest of the wise! When I lay my hands upon them, their skulls shall crack beneath my boots!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Le rugissement tonitruant d'Ulfar fait trembler les environs avant de se transformer en un ricanement bas et menaçant.{/n} « Par la poigne ferme du Père de Tous, à croire que ces xénos se prennent pour des génies, pour oser se moquer de nous de la sorte ! Amenez-les-moi, et je leur broierai le crâne sous mes bottes ! »

languages.text: {n}Ulfar'ın yeri göğü inleten kükremesi etrafı sarsıyor ve yavaşça alçalarak tehditkâr bir homurtuya dönüşüyor.{/n} "Yücebaba'nın sarsılmaz eli aşkına... Bu zenolar, kendilerini bilgelerin en bilgesi zannedip bizimle alay ediyor! Onları elime geçirdiğimde kafatasları çizmelerimin altında çatırdayacak!"
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar's thunderous roar shakes the surroundings, trailing off into a low, menacing rumble.{/n} "By the Allfather's steadfast hand, these xenos think to mock us, as if they count themselves the wisest of the wise! When I lay my hands upon them, their skulls shall crack beneath my boots!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Ulfar'ın yeri göğü inleten kükremesi etrafı sarsıyor ve yavaşça alçalarak tehditkâr bir homurtuya dönüşüyor.{/n} "Yücebaba'nın sarsılmaz eli aşkına... Bu zenolar, kendilerini bilgelerin en bilgesi zannedip bizimle alay ediyor! Onları elime geçirdiğimde kafatasları çizmelerimin altında çatırdayacak!"

languages.text: {n}El atronador rugido de Ulfar hace temblar las inmediaciones hasta convertirse en un rumor amenazador.{/n} «Por la mano del Padre de todas las cosas, ¡estos xenos se burlan de nosotros como si se creyeran los mayores sabios! Cuando los agarre, ¡trituraré sus cráneos bajo mis botas!».
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar's thunderous roar shakes the surroundings, trailing off into a low, menacing rumble.{/n} "By the Allfather's steadfast hand, these xenos think to mock us, as if they count themselves the wisest of the wise! When I lay my hands upon them, their skulls shall crack beneath my boots!"

traits.locale_text: {n}El atronador rugido de Ulfar hace temblar las inmediaciones hasta convertirse en un rumor amenazador.{/n} «Por la mano del Padre de todas las cosas, ¡estos xenos se burlan de nosotros como si se creyeran los mayores sabios! Cuando los agarre, ¡trituraré sus cráneos bajo mis botas!».

languages.text: {n}Ulfars dröhnender Schrei lässt die Umgebung erzittern, ehe er zu einem tiefen, bedrohlichen Knurren verblasst.{/n} "Bei der unerschütterlichen Hand des Allvaters, diese Xenos verspotten uns, als würden sie sich für besonders schlau halten! Wenn ich sie in die Finger bekomme, werden ihre Schädel unter meinen Stiefeln bersten!"
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar's thunderous roar shakes the surroundings, trailing off into a low, menacing rumble.{/n} "By the Allfather's steadfast hand, these xenos think to mock us, as if they count themselves the wisest of the wise! When I lay my hands upon them, their skulls shall crack beneath my boots!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Ulfars dröhnender Schrei lässt die Umgebung erzittern, ehe er zu einem tiefen, bedrohlichen Knurren verblasst.{/n} "Bei der unerschütterlichen Hand des Allvaters, diese Xenos verspotten uns, als würden sie sich für besonders schlau halten! Wenn ich sie in die Finger bekomme, werden ihre Schädel unter meinen Stiefeln bersten!"

languages.text: {n}ウルファルの轟く咆哮が周囲を揺るがし、低く唸るような威嚇に変わる。{/n} 「全神に仕える父なる神の力によって、この異種族は我々を嘲笑うとは思う。我々を最も賢い者と見なすのか！ 我が手によって彼らに襲いかかれば、彼らの頭蓋骨は私の靴の下で割れるだろう！」
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar's thunderous roar shakes the surroundings, trailing off into a low, menacing rumble.{/n} "By the Allfather's steadfast hand, these xenos think to mock us, as if they count themselves the wisest of the wise! When I lay my hands upon them, their skulls shall crack beneath my boots!"

traits.locale_text: {n}ウルファルの轟く咆哮が周囲を揺るがし、低く唸るような威嚇に変わる。{/n} 「全神に仕える父なる神の力によって、この異種族は我々を嘲笑うとは思う。我々を最も賢い者と見なすのか！ 我が手によって彼らに襲いかかれば、彼らの頭蓋骨は私の靴の下で割れるだろう！」
